overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy journeying through a lush tropical jungle environment and entering the tribal settlement of Fall's Edge, navigating wooden walkways and interacting with inhabitants.

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank through dense tropical vegetation toward a distant settlement

entered.detail: large waterfall cascading down rocky cliff with mist rising
clear turquoise water flowing alongside the path
tall palm trees lining the riverbank
large boulders covered in green moss and vegetation
large tropical ferns and undergrowth lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a lush tropical jungle environment with a turquoise river flowing alongside the path. A large waterfall is visible in the distance through the palm trees, and dense vegetation including giant ferns lines the riverbank as the character walks forward.

events.description: transitioning from dense jungle to open settlement outskirts with wooden structures
ascending grassy slope toward the main settlement entrance

agents.ego_description: ascending a grassy hill toward the settlement entrance, passing under rope bridges

notable_agents.action: tribal member standing on rope bridge overhead, observing the area

entered.detail: wooden rope bridge suspended between trees with tribal decorations
tall wooden support structures and scaffolding of the settlement
grass-covered slope leading up to the settlement entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense jungle into the outskirts of a tribal settlement, ascending a grassy hill. Wooden scaffolding and rope bridges become visible, with a tribal NPC standing on a bridge overhead. The river falls behind as the character approaches the settlement entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkways through dense tribal settlement

events.description: stepping onto elevated wooden walkways entering the dense tribal settlement
passing through narrow corridor with dense tribal architecture and colorful decorations

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow elevated wooden walkways through the dense settlement, passing many tribal inhabitants

notable_agents.action: tribal warrior walking toward camera carrying a spear
villager standing by wooden railing, watching the character pass

entered.detail: narrow wooden plank walkway elevated above the ground with rope railings
wooden spikes and colorful tribal banners decorating the walkway sides
primitive structures with thatched roofs built into the trees

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dense heart of the settlement, walking on elevated wooden walkways surrounded by tribal architecture. The path narrows between wooden structures decorated with spikes and colorful banners. Tribal inhabitants walk in opposing directions and stand along the railings as the character navigates through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper settlement plaza with central gathering structure

events.description: exiting narrow walkways into more open upper plaza with larger structures
tribal NPC approaches and engages in dialogue with the player character

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs and walking through upper settlement toward a large central building, engaging with NPCs

notable_agents.action: masked tribal member gesturing and speaking to the player character
group of villagers conversing near the large central structure

entered.detail: stone and wood stairs covered in grass leading upward
large central tribal structure built around massive tree trunks
red and green tribal banners hanging from wooden poles

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow walkways into a more open upper plaza area with grass-covered stairs and paths. A massive central tribal hall dominates the view ahead, while colorful banners line the path. Tribal NPCs gather and converse, with one approaching the character to engage in dialogue as the character continues toward the central structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the wild depths of a tropical jungle into the structured heart of a tribal settlement. It begins along a turquoise river lined with giant ferns and palm trees, moving toward a distant waterfall as the character pushes through the dense vegetation. As the jungle thins, the camera ascends a grassy hill where the river falls away, revealing the first signs of civilization in the form of wooden scaffolding and rope bridges. The scene then shifts into the dense interior of the settlement, navigating narrow, elevated wooden walkways adorned with spikes and colorful banners while passing tribal inhabitants. Finally, the path opens into a wide upper plaza with grass-covered stairs, leading toward a massive central tribal hall where NPCs gather and engage the character in dialogue.
